title: DESOLATIUM: Prologue
description:
We have always believed that God sent his son into the world to save us. But, what if that is not what happened? What if the world cannot be saved? The real story is about to be revealed. 

 

DESOLATIUM: PROLOGUE is a first-person point & click Graphic Adventure based on Lovecraft Mythos. Live this horror story where you will have to visit mysterious locations, face lovecraftian creatures, find clues and combine objects to solve puzzles.

 

EXPLORE MYSTERIOUS LOCATIONSExplore a city outside the limits of time and space; meet mysterious characters who will guide you on your journey. 

FACE LOVECRAFTIAN CREATURESFace lovecraftian creatures that came from the most remote places in the universe to test your sanity. 

FIND CLUESFind clues to move forward and uncover an intriguin backstory. 

COMBINE OBJECTS TO SOLVE PUZZLESInteract with the objects around you to solve complex puzzles in order to get to the terrible presence of a cosmic entity of immense power: Cthulhu.
description_short: DESOLATIUM: PROLOGUE is a first-person point & click Graphic Adventure based on Lovecraft Mythos. Live this horror story where you will have to visit mysterious locations, face lovecraftian creatures, find clues and combine objects to solve puzzles.
